{{Quote|Hurry, Artoo. Just how long can it take to sabotage a Star Destroyer?|[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] to [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]|<ref name="TPOT" />}}
The '''''Demolisher''''' was a [[Gladiator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Gladiator''-class]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] around [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]].<ref name="TPOT" />

==History==
[[File:Demolisher-SWArmada.png|thumb|left|200px|''Demolisher'' entering a planet's atmosphere]]

The ''Demolisher'' was [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Terrinald Screed/Legends|Screed's]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] during the early years of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He used the vessel while on campaigns in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EGTW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>
At some point, the ''Demolisher'' was stolen from an Imperial repair dock by the space [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Gir Kybo Ren-Cha]] and his crew. They intended to use it against the [[Tammuz-an space navy]] in an attempt to plunder [[Tammuz-an/Legends|their world]].<ref name="TPOT" />

During the battle, [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] (who had been captured alongside [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]) reversed a [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] he was ordered to load into one of ''Demolisher''{{'s}} launch tubes, causing it to explode and cripple the Star Destroyer.<ref name="TPOT" />

==Behind the scenes==
An interesting feature of this ship was that turbolaser shots fired always seemed to emit from the ring around the reactor dome on the bottom of the ship, or from the reactor itself. This is similar to ships in ''Star Trek'', which possess phaser banks on rings on the top or bottom of the ships. Due to the amount of projectile ordnance the ''Demolisher'' possessed, the ship's design seemed to have been focused on missile delivery, suggesting that Gladiators were used as artillery support ships, and not actually used for capital-ship combat. The small number of traditional capital-ship weapon emplacements would only be a threat to small ships, such as blockade runners, and the missile launchers would have to be used as the primary weapons.

{{Ship-stub}}
